name: recorded-origin-kinds
description: Evidence classifications for how expression entered the composition, never legal authorship categories.

entries.meaning: CPL records direct human expressive input.
CPL records human expressive input mediated by transcription.
Expression was accepted from a recorded AI-system output.
Expression entered through import or paste without inferred authorship.
Expression was restored from a recorded project revision.
No exact recorded origin is available for the expression.
